title: 83.96% men, 86.2% women voted at polling stations in Assembly poll across Tamil Nadu: EC
description: A total of 4,87,98,833 voters out of 5,73,43,291 turned up to exercise their franchise on April 23 in T.N. Assembly polls; total votes polled may go up as the current figures do not include postal ballots or senior citizens who voted through Form 12D
